debug_info.goal:
⊢ PEqualsNP →
    ∀ (k : ℕ) (α : Type) [inst : Primcodable α] (ea : FinEncoding α) (L : Language α), SigmakP k ea L ↔ InP ea L

failed_attempts:
by
  intro h_peqnp k
  induction k with
  | zero => simp [SigmakP, Sigma0P]
  | succ k ih =>
    intro α _ ea L
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases' h with β instβ eb L' hL'
      cases' hL' with hL' hbound
      have hL'_in_p : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        cases k
        · exact hL'
        · have : PikP k (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := hL'
          sorry
      sorry
    · intro h
      use Unit, inferInstance, finUnitEncoding, fun a b => h a
      constructor
      · cases k <;> simp_all [Pi0P, PikP]
      · use 0
        simp_all

by
  intro h_peqnp k
  induction k with
  | zero => simp [SigmakP, Sigma0P]
  | succ k ih =>
    intro α _ ea L
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases' h with β instβ eb L' hL'
      cases' hL' with hL' hbound
      have hL'_in_p : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        cases k
        · exact hL'
        · rw [← ih] at hL'; exact hL'
      obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := hL'_in_p
      use fun a => (a, Classical.choose (hbound a))
      use TM2ComputableInPolyTime.mk (fun a => (a, Classical.choose (hbound a)))
        (by
          -- Need to show this function is polytime computable
          -- Since we only need existence and P=NP gives us enough power,
          -- we can rely on the fact that projection and pairing are polytime.
          sorry)
      intro a
      simp
      have hcert := Classical.choose_spec (hbound a)
      tauto
    · intro h
      use Unit, inferInstance, finUnitEncoding, fun p : α × Unit => h p.1
      constructor
      · cases k
        · simp [Pi0P, Sigma0P]; exact h
        · rw [ih]; exact h
      · use 0
        intro a
        use ()
        simp

by
  intro h_peqnp k
  induction k with
  | zero => simp [SigmakP, Sigma0P]
  | succ k ih =>
    intro α _ ea L
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases' h with β instβ eb L' hL'
      cases' hL' with hL' hbound
      have hL'_in_p : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        cases k
        · exact hL'
        · rw [← ih] at hL'; exact hL'
      cases' hbound with p hp
      have h_in_p : InP ea L := by
        apply InP_of_exists_bounded
        exact ⟨p, fun a => by
          have h1 : L a ↔ ∃ b, (eb.encode b).length ≤ Polynomial.eval (ea.encode a).length p ∧ L' (a, b) := hp a
          rw [h1]
          exact ⟨fun ⟨b, hb, hL'ab⟩ => ⟨b, hb, hL'_in_p _ hL'ab⟩,
                fun ⟨b, hb, hL'ab⟩ => ⟨b, hb, hL'_in_p.mp hL'ab⟩⟩⟩
      exact h_in_p
    · intro h
      cases k
      · exact h
      · have h_in_sigmak : SigmakP k ea L := by
          rw [ih]
          exact h
        exact h_in_sigmak

by
  intro h_peq_np k
  induction k with
  | zero => simp [SigmakP, Sigma0P]
  | succ k ih =>
    intro α _ ea L
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases' h with β ⟨instβ, eb, L', hL', p, h_cert⟩
      have h_oracle : Pi0P (pairEncoding ea eb) L' ∨ PikP k (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        cases k
        · left; exact hL'
        · right; exact hL'
      cases' h_oracle with h_pi h_pi
      · -- k = 0 case: Σ₁ᴾ = NP, and P = NP implies NP = P
        have h_np : InNP ea (fun a => ∃ b, (eb.encode b).length ≤ Polynomial.eval (ea.encode a).length p ∧ L' (a, b)) := by
          use β, instβ, eb, L', p
          exact h_cert
        exact h_peq_np.mp h_np
      · -- k ≥ 1 case: use induction hypothesis
        sorry
    · intro h_in_p
      use Unit, inferInstance, default, fun _ => true
      constructor
      · -- Complement of P is P, so Πₖᴾ contains trivial language
        cases k
        · exact h_in_p
        · sorry
      · use 0
        intro a
        constructor
        · intro _
          use ()
          simp
        · intro ⟨_, _⟩
          exact h_in_p a

      · use 0
        simp [h]

by
  intro h_peqnp k
  induction k with
  | zero => exact fun α _ ea L => Iff.intro (fun h => h) (fun h => h)
  | succ k ih =>
    intro α _ ea L
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases' h with β instβ eb L' hL'
      cases' hL' with hL' hbound
      have hL'_in_p : InP (pairEncoding ea eb) L' := by
        cases k
        · exact hL'
        · apply ih
          exact hL'
      sorry
    · intro h
      use Unit, inferInstance, default, fun a _ => h a
      constructor
      · cases k <;> simp_all [Pi0P, Sigma0P]
      · use 0
        intro a
        simp_all
